ModifyDataSrc.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
ModifyDataSrc.dataSrcId: ID of the data source to be modified
ModifyDataSrc.instanceId: Unique ID of the RapidFS instance that the data source belongs to
ModifyDataSrc.keepSymlink: Whether to retain BOS soft links; retaining them reduces data source import efficiency and incremental metadata sync efficiency.
ModifyDataSrc.description: Description of the data source, no more than 256 characters
ModifyDataSrc.quotaMiB: Capacity quota for the data source, indicating the maximum available capacity; cannot exceed the total cache capacity of the instance. -1 means no capacity limit is applied to the data source
